response.overview: The Montreal-based indie-folk songwriter brings 'Blurring Time' to the screen with a short documentary tracing the making of his tender 2025 Polaris Music Prize-longlisted album.  Built from recordings captured before and after his transition, the film is a quiet, intimate portrait of process, change, and self.
response.tagline: A quiet, intimate portrait of process, change, and self.
response.title: Bells Larsen: Blurring Time (the documentary)
